name: ydata-profiling (pandas-profiling)

performance.notes: Report generation can take minutes for large datasets; sample for speed

agent_readiness.notes: Automated exploratory data analysis for pandas DataFrames. Generate comprehensive HTML reports with one line: ProfileReport(df). Reports include: descriptive statistics, distributions, correlations, missing values, duplicates, interactions. Warnings for data quality issues. Supports time series. Integrates with Jupyter. Formerly pandas-profiling. Used by data scientists for fast initial data exploration.

gotchas: Slow for large datasets — use sample_n or minimal=True
HTML reports not easily parsed programmatically (for automation use Sweetviz or manual stats)
Correlation computation expensive for many columns
Some statistics may be inaccurate for highly skewed distributions
best_when: Initial data exploration and quality assessment
Generating data documentation reports for stakeholders
Detecting data quality issues before ML training
avoid_when: Large datasets (use sampling or Great Expectations for production checks)
Programmatic data validation (use Great Expectations or Pandera)
summary: ydata-profiling (formerly pandas-profiling) generates comprehensive HTML EDA reports from pandas DataFrames in one line. Includes statistics, distributions, correlations, missing value analysis, and data quality warnings. Used by data scientists for rapid initial data exploration. Slow for large datasets — use sampling. Best for human consumption; for automated validation use Pandera or Great Expectations.
